changelog: FIX — NetworkOnMainThreadException root-cause when opening the channel picker: SportsApi.gameChannels() makes a synchronous OkHttp call but I was calling it inside LaunchedEffect on Dispatchers.Main. Wrapped in withContext(Dispatchers.IO) so the network I/O runs on a worker thread. (This was the actual reason the picker showed an error every time — not a timeout.)

FIX — DISMISS button couldn't be focused. I was only requesting focus on the first ChannelRow when matches were present; in the error/empty/loading state the outer Box kept focus and the DISMISS button never received it. Now firstFocus.requestFocus() fires after every state transition (loading/matches/error), with a 50 ms yield so the FocusRequester is attached before the request.
